clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation profiles across cortico-limbic structures underlying the overarching computation of internal feeling states and emotional valence.
This cluster maps onto dopamine-rich frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuits dedicated to computing subjective utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed motivation.
These concepts co-activate within cortical midline and default mode structures, representing a unified domain for processing internally generated models of oneself and other conscious agents.
